product_overview: Taskty is a real-time service marketplace that connects clients with nearby service providers, enabling on-demand requests, provider acceptance via a live map, tracking, and administrative management.
core_goals: Allow clients to request immediate services from nearby providers using a radar-style request flow
Enable providers to go online, discover nearby requests on a map, and accept bookings
Provide clients with real-time tracking and in-app chat with an assigned provider
Support basic account creation and authentication for clients and providers
Allow administrators to manage providers, services, and view platform statistics
Support in-app payment options (cash or card) as part of the booking lifecycle

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Create and sign in to client or provider accounts to access protected app functionality.
user_flows: Navigate to /register -> Select client role -> Fill required registration fields -> Submit registration form -> Land on client entry point (/quick_request)
Navigate to /register -> Select provider role -> Fill required registration fields -> Submit registration form -> Land on provider entry point (/provider_map)
Navigate to /login -> Fill email -> Fill password -> Submit login form -> Land on role-appropriate entry point (/quick_request for clients, /provider_map for providers)
Navigate to /login -> Submit missing or invalid credentials -> See validation error and remain on /login

features.name: Service Radar (Quick Request)
features.description: Clients create an immediate service request using a radar-style interface and see nearby providers.
user_flows: Navigate to /quick_request -> Select service category -> Provide required request details -> Submit service request -> View nearby providers on map
Navigate to /quick_request -> Leave a required field empty -> See form validation error

features.name: Provider Acceptance (Provider Map)
features.description: Providers toggle availability, view incoming requests on a real-time map, inspect details, and accept bookings.
user_flows: Navigate to /provider_map -> Toggle online status to available -> View request markers on map -> Inspect a request's details -> Accept client request -> See booking confirmation
Navigate to /provider_map -> Toggle online status to unavailable -> No new request markers appear

features.name: Real-time Tracking and Chat
features.description: After a provider accepts a booking, clients can track the provider's location in real time and exchange messages.
user_flows: Navigate to /tracking -> See active booking and provider location on the map -> Observe provider location update over time -> Send chat message to provider -> See message appear in the conversation

features.name: Admin Management
features.description: Administrators view platform statistics, manage the service catalog, and verify or unverify provider profiles.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin_dashboard -> View platform statistics and summaries -> Open provider list -> Verify provider profile -> See provider verification status updated

features.name: Payments
features.description: Clients complete payment for a completed service using cash or an in-app card flow.
user_flows: Navigate to /tracking -> Choose payment method for the booking -> Enter payment details for card or select cash -> Submit payment method -> See payment confirmation and booking marked as paid

routes.description: Account creation for client and provider roles
Real-time map for providers to accept nearby requests
Radar-style service request creation for clients

features.name: Service Radar
features.description: Client searches for nearby providers using a radar interface

features.name: Provider Acceptance
features.description: Provider views and accepts nearby client requests on a map

features.name: Admin Management
features.description: Admin manages services, categories, and provider verification

known_limitations.issue: Paymob integration might return 404 if Integration ID is incorrect
known_limitations.impact: Electronic payments will fail, fallback to cash required
